title: Oairse 8cm Large Christmas Bauble Ornaments 6 Pcs Shatterproof Big Blue Bauble for Xmas Tree Glitter Christmas Tree Ornaments for Halloween Holiday Wedding Party Decoration
features: Special Glitter Design - This big christmas tree ornaments has charm look, features a classic bead shape, it covered glitter finish and adorned with glitter sequins, presenting a shiny and elegant visual effect and bring a strong festival atmosphere to your home. We offer 11 different classical colors of large christmas ornaments allows you to decorate your Xmas tree quickly and arrange your Christmas interior scene

Shatterproof Christmas Ornaments - Our large champagne ornaments are made of premium from and plastic with glitter & sequins, the texture doesn't look plastic, it is uneasy to deform, break or fade, which conbines the beauty and the luster of real glass with the anti-fragile practicality of plastic, its exquisite workmanship makes it look delicate even after long use, it can be used all year round

Christmas Baubles Ornaments Set - These big ornaments for christmas tree are 3.94"/10cm, pack of 6 balls included a string for hanging, the big xmas balls are light weight and won't weigh down the Christmas tree branches, are perfect fit for any normal size Xmas tree decoration without looking out of place

Decorative Hanging Ornaments - Champagne holiday ornaments will make great addition to your Halloween, Christmas and holiday decorations. The 4 inch red christmas ornaments are ideal decorations in home, hotel, restaurant, party, wedding, Christmas showcase landscape layout, malls, as Christmas hanging ornaments on tree branches, table centerpieces, around banister, above reception at different lengths, etc. You can also DIY your wreath, garland, and balls painting by our large christmas balls

Easy to Hang - Each 4 inch shatterproof ornaments are equipped a dismountable hook with lace rope for you to hang your christmas tree balls easily. These large christmas tree ornaments can hang on the tree and remove them easily, that means you can decorate your Christmas tree in a short time. With a shatterproof design, our christmas ornaments offer a worry-free way to decorate the tree, it is ideal for homes with children or pets
